title: Study MBBS in Georgia for Indian Students – Atlas Mentor

MBBS in Georgia

  • Home

Georgia

Study MBBS in Georgia for Indian Students

Georgia is one of the best destinations for Indian students to study MBBS abroad. With world-class medical universities, affordable fees, and globally recognized degrees, MBBS in Georgia offers a great opportunity for students who dream of becoming doctors.

Universities In Georgia?

About Georgia

Georgia is a beautiful country located at the crossroads of Europe and Asia. It is known for its rich history, friendly people, and strong education system. The country has become a popular choice for Indian students who want to study MBBS abroad because of its high-quality medical universities, affordable tuition fees, and safe environment.

Georgia offers modern infrastructure, advanced medical training, and globally recognized degrees, making it an excellent destination for aspiring doctors. With a 95% literacy rate and a student-friendly atmosphere, Georgia provides the perfect setting for medical students to learn and grow.

Population37,00,000 (as of May, 2024)

Top-Quality Education

Georgian medical universities offer world-class education with modern facilities and global recognition.

Affordable Costs

MBBS in Georgia is budget-friendly, with low tuition fees and living expenses.

Safe for Students

Georgia is a safe country with a welcoming environment for international students

Eligibility

Eligibility for MBBS in Georgia for Indian Students

Indian students can easily apply for MBBS in Georgia as the admission criteria are simple and student-friendly.

10+2 Qualification

Must have completed 12th grade with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology.

Minimum Marks

At least 50% in PCB (40% for reserved category).

NEET Qualification

NEET is mandatory for Indian students to practice in India after graduation.

Age Requirement

Must be at least 17 years old at the time of admission.

English Proficiency

No IELTS/TOEFL required, but students must understand English well.

Is Georgia Safe for Indian Medical Students?

Yes, Georgia is one of the safest countries for Indian medical students. It has a low crime rate and a welcoming environment for international students.

  • Low Crime Rate – Ranked among the safest countries in the world.

  • Friendly Locals – Georgian people are warm and welcoming to foreigners.

  • Student-Friendly Environment – Universities provide support and safety for students.

  • Quick Emergency Response – Police and medical services are efficient and reliable.

  • Affordable Healthcare – Medical care is accessible and reasonably priced.

Indian students in Georgia feel secure and comfortable, making it an ideal place to study MBBS without safety concerns.

Advantages of Studying MBBS in Georgia

Studying MBBS in Georgia is a great choice for Indian students due to its high-quality education, affordable costs, and globally recognized degrees.

1. Affordable Tuition Fees

MBBS in Georgia costs less than private medical colleges in India.

2. Globally Recognized Degree

Approved by WHO, NMC, ECFMG, and other medical bodies.

3. No Entrance Exam

Direct admission without IELTS/TOEFL.

4. English-Medium Education

MBBS courses are taught in English.

5. Excellent Clinical Training

Hands-on practice in well-equipped hospitals.

6. Safe & Friendly Environment

Georgia has a low crime rate and a welcoming culture.

7. Easy Visa Process

Hassle-free student visa application for Indian students.

8. Internship in Top Hospitals

Students gain real-world medical experience.

9. Budget Accommodation

MBBS in Georgia costs less than private medical colleges in India.

10. International Career Opportunities

Graduates can work in India, the USA, the UK, and other countries.

LOAN

Education Loan for Indian Students to Study MBBS in Russia

Indian students can apply for an education loan to cover tuition fees and living expenses while studying MBBS in Georgia. Many banks and financial institutions offer student loans for studying abroad.

  • Loan Amount – Covers tuition fees, hostel charges, and living expenses.

  • Eligibility – Based on NEET score, university admission letter, and financial background.

  • Required Documents – NEET scorecard, admission letter, income proof, property documents (if required).

  • Loan Repayment – Starts after course completion, with flexible repayment options.

  • Banks & NBFCs – Education loans are available from nationalized banks, private banks, and NBFCs.

At Atlas Mentor, our counselors assist students in securing education loans for MBBS in Georgia, ensuring a smooth process.

F. A. Q

Frequently Asked Questions on MBBS in Georgia

Planning to study MBBS in Georgia? Here are some of the most common questions Indian students ask before applying, covering eligibility, fees, duration, and career opportunities.

Is MBBS Degree from Georgia Recognised?

Yes, the degree is valid worldwide. Medical colleges in Georgia are recognized by the NMC, WHO, WFME, ECFMG, and FAIMER.

 

Is NEET Mandatory for MBBS in Georgia?

Yes, NEET exam is mandatory for all Indian students applying for MBBS in Georgia.

Is Indian Food Available for the Students?

Yes, many colleges have canteens and hostel mess serving good quality Indian food. Indian food is quite popular among Georgians. You can easily find Indian restaurants and even grocery stores selling Indian food items.

 

Which Georgian Universities have the Best FMGE Passing Percentage?

Top three Georgian universities with the best FMGE passing percentage are: Tbilisi State Medical University, Geomedi Medical University, David Tvildiani Medical University

 

How can a Student get a Licence to Practice after Studying MBBS in Georgia?

After 6 years of study and internship, students can appear for the NPDQE to obtain a licence to practice. After passing the exam, students can continue with their PG studies or opt for residency at the clinics and hospitals accredited by the Ministry of Health.
